prose.title: 25e mos
prose.body: The 25E MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) is a Signal Support Systems Specialist in the United States Army. This job is responsible for providing communication and technical support to military units. Some of the tasks of a 25E include installing, operating, and maintaining communication equipment, troubleshooting and repairing communication systems, setting up and maintaining network infrastructure, and assisting with the planning and integration of communication systems on the battlefield. It is an important role in ensuring effective communication within military operations.
